codeReview.summary: Pass: reviewing the fix transcript plus both commits shows the rerun closes the prior blocking gaps. Commit `0475c46` replaces the transcript-backed terminal with a dedicated Termux-backed terminal adapter and upgrades the repo-local SSH fixture to a real PTY-backed shell, while commit `664e395` moves the acceptance proof onto the live fixture session flow so disconnect truthfulness, special keys, clipboard paste, full-screen alternate-screen behavior, and viewport-driven resize are all exercised against the real SSH/PTY boundary.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and both relevant diffs (`0475c46`, `664e395`). The fix adequately addresses the original failures: the app now uses a dedicated live terminal boundary backed by the repo-local PTY fixture, and the live-fixture instrumentation proves special keys, paste, viewport resize, disconnect truthfulness, and representative full-screen behavior through the real app/session surface rather than fake controllers.
